title: Acsmithia brongniartiana
taxonomy: Acsmithia brongniartiana is a species of plant, and based on available information, it belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This family consists of trees and shrubs commonly known as the soapberry or soapbark family. The genus Acsmithia is a monotypic genus, containing only this single species. Further classification would involve the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. This species is native to Australia.
